workflow: LiDAR .laz -> Poisson(Geogram) reconstruct -> Geogram remesh -> mesh bench (inward offset) -> packable volume
note: Poisson(Geogram) surface from the LiDAR cloud, Geogram-remeshed; the mesh bench is an inward-offset axis-aligned box inside the scanned rock envelope - a clean closed packable container for Block Pack / Rubble Multi-Bin.
